title: Primordium
description: Minecraft if it was made by an insane person.
body:
NOTE: This modpack has been archived. I plan to rebuild in from the ground up on Curseforge in the future.
Minecraft if it was made by an insane person. Light realism? Check. Complexified start? Check. Nerfing/removal of major mechanics? Check and double check.
It's lightweight too, with less than 60 mods included and decent framerates even on weaker devices!

> Mods used:
- Ageing Spawners by Mrbysco, ShyNieke
- AppleSkin by squeek
- Better Nether Map by Jummit, Syric
- Cloth Config v10 API by shedaniel
- Collective by Rick South
- Corpse by Max Henkel
- Craftable Saddles
- CullLeaves by Motschen, TeamMidnightDust
- Curios API by C4
- Deactivate Riptide Flight by Thanatoros
- Embeddium by embeddedt
- Embeddium Extra by dima_dencep, FlashyReese
- First Aid by ichttt
- GUI Clock by Rick South
- GUI Compass by Rick South
- GeckoLib 4 by Gecko, Eliot, AzureDoom, DerToaster, Tslat, Witixin
- GlitchCore by Adubbz
- HT's TreeChop by hammertater
- Hardcore Torches by Wolfie_Waffle
- Harder Branch Mining Mod by MacTso, Lupicus
- Horse Stonks by SanityCh3ck
- Improved Mobs Mod by Flemmli97
- Ink & Quill by Stasidzie
- Just Enough Items by mezz
- Mended Mending by tinytransfem
- MidnightLib by TeamMidnightDust, Motschen
- Mob Spider Climb by Ferrin
- More Amethyst Recipes by 5imModding
- More Zombie Villagers by Rick South
- New Bundle Craft by Sorcell
- No Enchanted End City Loot by NextRaven
- No More Patrols by millennIumAMbiguity
- No More Structures by hftdanny
- No Netherite by Cootshk
- No Recipe Book Reborn by IronFractal
- No Sleeping by auki, MCreator
- Nyf's Spiders by Nyfaria
- Radium by dima_dencep, NanoLive
- Serene Seasons by Adubbz, Forstride
- Simple Block Physics by Ferrin
- Sorry but the Elytra is in another End City by precisemodpacker

- TNT's Harder Beds by TNT_Blox_0
- TenshiLib by Flemmli97
- Tough As Nails by Adubbz, Forstride
- True Darkness
- Wither Skeleton Archers in Fortresses by badooga
- Wooden tools are dumb by MoonFather
- no f3 by SinyoMinyo
